headlines.headline: Calvos Genomics files routine patent applications in renewable storage

sentiment.reasoning: Routine patent filings are standard operational activity and do not provide immediate material financial impact.

sentiment.reasoning: A 3% margin improvement indicates operational efficiency gains that directly benefit the bottom line.

headlines.headline: Kelvik Power files routine patent applications in automated logistics

sentiment.reasoning: Routine patent filings are standard business maintenance and lack immediate financial significance.

headlines.headline: Kelvik Power sees mixed results in enterprise software pilot program

headlines.headline: Nolvol Resources announces significant capital expenditure plan for Scandinavia

sentiment.reasoning: Delaying a product launch postpones expected revenue and may signal internal execution challenges.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
